title: Fiber LSP provider registry
description: A public phonebook of Fiber LSP endpoints. It carries ONLY static identity — a client resolves live, dynamic terms (fees, capacity, JIT support) by calling each provider's GET /lsp/v1/info. Add a provider by pull request.

provider.description: One LSP's static identity. No pricing, capacity, liquidity, or channel-topology fields — those are dynamic and are read live from /lsp/v1/info (terms) or the gossip graph (topology), never trusted from this file.

base_url.description: The LSP REST base URL (LSPS-Fiber). The client appends /lsp/v1/*.

lsp_pubkey.description: The LSP node's Fiber pubkey (0x-hex). Recommended: lets a client cross-verify the endpoint against the on-graph node and merge registry + gossip entries by identity.

operator.description: Who runs this provider (org or handle).
